title: Solo.io Gloo Gateway Virtual Service
description: A virtual service that defines routing rules, security policies, and traffic management settings for incoming requests to Gloo Gateway.

metadata.description: Resource metadata including name, namespace, and labels.

status.description: Current status of the virtual service resource.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for the virtual service.

domains.description: List of domains that this virtual service handles.

sslConfig.description: TLS/SSL configuration for the virtual service.
